description: Unified Clip Architecture — single clips table, dataset_clips join table, one search mode, structured enrichment columns. Staging DB first.

userStories.title: Create clips table DDL on staging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the clips table created on staging with all structured columns.
acceptanceCriteria: Create clips table with: id (uuid PK), s3_bucket (text NOT NULL), s3_key (text NOT NULL), mime_type, filename, UNIQUE(s3_bucket, s3_key)
Add annotation columns: ann_metadata (jsonb), ann_annotation_key (text), ann_specs_key (text)

Add technical columns: tech_file_size_bytes (bigint), tech_duration_seconds (numeric), tech_resolution_width (int), tech_resolution_height (int), tech_fps (numeric), tech_codec (text), tech_bit_depth (int)
Add AI columns: ai_caption (text), ai_agent_context (jsonb), ai_enrichment_source (text), ai_enrichment_json (jsonb)
Add derived fields: caption_text (text), embedding vector(768), caption_rebuilt_at (timestamptz)
Add timestamps: created_at, updated_at with auto-update trigger
Create HNSW index on embedding column
Apply via Supabase MCP on staging DB (kpjcbemvwxffibiohmvi)
Verify table exists with correct columns
userStories.notes: Use HNSW not IVFFlat. Service role bypasses RLS. Ref: PRD canonical schema section.

userStories.title: Create dataset_clips join table on staging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the dataset_clips join table on staging.
acceptanceCriteria: Create dataset_clips: id (uuid PK), dataset_id (FK datasets), clip_id (FK clips), lead_id (FK leads nullable), added_by (text), note (text), created_at (timestamptz)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_dataset_clips_unique ON dataset_clips (dataset_id, clip_id, COALESCE(lead_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'))
Apply via Supabase MCP on staging
userStories.notes: Expression-based unique INDEX, not UNIQUE constraint.

userStories.title: Create match_clips RPC on staging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the unified vector search RPC.
acceptanceCriteria: Create match_clips(query_embedding vector(768), match_count int, filter_dataset_id uuid, filter_bucket text, match_threshold float)

Returns: id, s3_bucket, s3_key, ai_caption, caption_text, similarity, ai_enrichment_source, ai_agent_context, mime_type, tech_resolution_width, tech_resolution_height, tech_fps, tech_duration_seconds, tech_codec, ann_metadata
SECURITY DEFINER, SET search_path TO public, extensions
Apply via Supabase MCP on staging

userStories.title: Migrate video_index to clips on staging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 47k video_index rows migrated into clips.
acceptanceCriteria: Map: s3_bucket, s3_key, caption_text -> ai_caption AND caption_text, enrichment_source -> ai_enrichment_source, embedding -> embedding, indexed_at -> created_at
Set caption_rebuilt_at = NOW() for rows with valid embeddings
Validate: clips count matches video_index count

userStories.title: Migrate dataset_samples to clips + dataset_clips on staging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need 714 dataset_samples merged into clips with re-embedding and relationships preserved.
acceptanceCriteria: Upsert into clips matching on s3_bucket + s3_object_key -> s3_key
Map: enrichment_json -> ai_enrichment_json, agent_context -> ai_agent_context, metadata_json -> ann_metadata, s3_annotation_key -> ann_annotation_key, s3_specs_key -> ann_specs_key, tech fields
Re-embed at 768 dims for rows needing embeddings (631 of 714)
Create dataset_clips rows preserving dataset_id + lead_id
Deduplicate: GROUP BY s3 key -> one clips row + multiple dataset_clips
Skip 20 rows with NULL s3_object_key (log them)

userStories.title: Add Clip and DatasetClip TypeScript types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need types matching the new schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Clip interface to src/types/data-catalog.ts matching canonical schema
Add field mapping comments in code
DO NOT change generateEmbedding() default — add explicit 768 to new call sites
userStories.notes: Embedding default changes AFTER US-007 and US-015.

userStories.title: Rewrite search API for clips
userStories.description: As a developer, the search API must query clips via match_clips.
acceptanceCriteria: Rewrite src/app/api/admin/catalog/search/route.ts to use match_clips only
Browse mode: clips JOIN dataset_clips when dataset filter set
Lead assignment: single dataset_clips query (collapse two queries into one)

userStories.title: Rewrite admin search UI — remove mode toggle
userStories.description: As an admin, one unified search across all clips.
acceptanceCriteria: Update server component: bucket list and clip count from clips table
Remove all source: catalog | full_corpus logic
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add admin search filters and structured detail modal
userStories.description: As an admin, structured detail modal tabs and new filters.
acceptanceCriteria: ResultDetailModal: structured sections for Annotation, AI enrichment, Technical
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Rewrite bulk actions for dataset_clips
userStories.description: As an admin, adding clips to datasets inserts dataset_clips rows.
acceptanceCriteria: Bulk bar: Add to Dataset + Create New Dataset tabs
Remove all data-copy logic from bulk actions
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Bulk bar simplified to 2 tabs. API accepts clip_ids array. AddToLeadButton uses clipId prop.

userStories.title: Rewrite portal dataset detail for clips
userStories.description: As a lead, see clip data from unified table.
acceptanceCriteria: Field renames: s3_object_key -> s3_key, remove media_url/storage_path fallback
Lead filter with DISTINCT ON (clip_id) to prevent duplicates
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Queries dataset_clips with clips(*) join. Dedup by clip_id in JS. GalleryCard accepts ClipLike union type. Legacy ?sample= still works.

userStories.title: Add clip detail modal tabs
userStories.description: As a user, structured tabs: Annotation | AI | Technical.
acceptanceCriteria: Annotation tab: live S3 fetch via ann_annotation_key
Technical tab: resolution, fps, duration, codec
Hidden from portal: ai_enrichment_source, internal IDs
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: ClipDetailModal replaces SampleDetailModal. New DataPanelRegistry entries: ai_enrichment (Bot icon), technical (Cpu icon). Legacy SampleDetailModal re-exported for backward compat.

userStories.title: Rewrite portal catalog index for dataset_clips
userStories.description: As a lead, catalog browser uses dataset_clips.
acceptanceCriteria: Curated samples: dataset_clips WHERE lead_id = current_lead (replaces lead_custom_samples query)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Curated samples now query dataset_clips WHERE lead_id + JOIN clips for ai_caption, s3_bucket, s3_key. No more lead_custom_samples or video_index queries.

userStories.title: Update S3 annotation API for clips
userStories.description: As a developer, annotation fetch works with clips table.
acceptanceCriteria: Look up clip by ID from clips table using admin client
userStories.notes: Removed legacy dataset_samples path. Uses admin client for clips lookup. fetchAnnotationJson now accepts bucketOverride.

userStories.title: Update MCP search tools
userStories.description: As an MCP agent, unified search_clips tool.
acceptanceCriteria: build_lead_brief: collapse TWO embedding+RPC calls into ONE
Update get_dataset_overview, download_clips, get_corpus_stats for clips
userStories.notes: search_clips uses 768-dim embedding + match_clips RPC. build_lead_brief collapsed from 2 embed calls to 1.

userStories.title: Update MCP catalog management tools
userStories.description: As an MCP agent, catalog tools use dataset_clips.
userStories.notes: All catalog tools now use dataset_clips. No data copying. get_lead also updated.

userStories.title: Update loader scripts for clips
userStories.description: As a developer, loaders write to their own clips columns.
acceptanceCriteria: load-annotation-metadata.py: writes ann_*, tech_* on clips, sets caption_rebuilt_at = NULL
load_cobry_captions.py: writes ai_caption, ai_enrichment_source on clips, sets caption_rebuilt_at = NULL
re-enrich-annotation-frames.py: writes ai_caption, ai_enrichment_source on clips, sets caption_rebuilt_at = NULL
Each writes ONLY its own columns
All use INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
userStories.notes: Loaders no longer embed. Rebuild script handles that.

userStories.title: Create caption rebuild script
userStories.description: As a developer, derives caption_text + embedding from all sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Select clips WHERE caption_rebuilt_at IS NULL
Build caption_text from: ann_metadata + tech specs + ai_caption

userStories.title: Update admin catalog detail pages
userStories.description: As an admin, catalog detail reads from clips via dataset_clips.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin catalog [id] page queries clips via dataset_clips
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Drop legacy tables
userStories.description: As a developer, remove old tables after staging validation.
acceptanceCriteria: All surfaces confirmed working on staging

userStories.title: Replicate migration to production
userStories.description: As a developer, apply validated migration to prod.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate search, portal, MCP on prod
userStories.notes: Final story. Only after all staging stories pass.
